roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:110 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MUST ENGAGEIN TREATMENT AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE BY HIS PAROLE AGENT,VIOLATION # 1 - ABSCONDING IS DISMISSED,COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE ON 2-25-2014WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASEAND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
